documentation.description: Create the vault by storing a SHA-256 hash of the secret.

args.commitment: - the secret value to hash and store as the vault commitment

documentation.description: Demonstrate all four hash algorithms on the same input.

args.data: - the input data to hash with all four algorithms

documentation.returns: concatenation of all four hash outputs (128 bytes total)

documentation.description: Verify an Ed25519 signature and unlock the vault.

args.data: - the original message that was signed

documentation.returns: true if the signature is valid

documentation.description: Demonstrate scratch space with uint64 values.

args.iterations: - the uint64 value to store, load, and double via scratch space

documentation.returns: the doubled value read back from scratch space

documentation.description: Verify a preimage matches the stored commitment.

args.preimage: - the candidate preimage to check against the stored hash

documentation.returns: true if the preimage hashes to the stored commitment
